description: Benchmark baseline for Ranvier Core CI regression testing
notes: Baseline established with mock vLLM backends (docker-compose.test.yml)
CI mode uses LOCUST_WAIT_MIN=0.1 LOCUST_WAIT_MAX=0.5 for higher throughput
Default wait (1-3s) gives ~67 req/s; CI wait (0.1-0.5s) gives ~250+ req/s
Update baseline via: gh workflow run benchmark.yml -f update_baseline=true
